name: @rayzen/electron
description: PDV desktop offline-first para bares e restaurantes.
author: Rayzen PDV

scripts.package:win: pnpm run stage:app && pnpm exec electron-forge package builders/app-package --platform win32
scripts.make:win: pnpm run stage:app && pnpm exec electron-forge make builders/app-package --platform win32 --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip
scripts.make:installer:win: pnpm run stage:app && pnpm exec electron-forge make builders/app-package --platform win32 --targets @electron-forge/maker-squirrel
